views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's study time, active subjects with mastery rings, current streak, and a quick-add FAB. Top section has a large animated progress ring toward daily goal, stat grid below shows streak/weekly hours/active subjects count.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-log a study session: pick subject from recent subjects or type new, select category and resource type, set duration with stepper, rate confidence 1-5, optionally set completion %. Smart defaults pre-fill the last-used subject and category.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable date-grouped list of all study sessions. Each row shows subject, category icon, duration, confidence dots, and resource type badge. Filter by category or subject. Swipe to delete.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: (1) Weekly bar chart of daily study minutes with goal line overlay, (2) Category pie chart showing time distribution, (3) Confidence trend line per subject over time, (4) Insight cards with AI-style observations about learning patterns, plateaus, and improvement suggestions.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for all entries dated today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayTotalMinutes / dailyGoalMinutes clamped to 0...1 for progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for entries in the current ISO week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: previousWeekMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of durationMinutes for entries in the previous ISO week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekChange
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (weeklyTotal - previousWeek) / previousWeek * 100. Positive = improving.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of consecutive calendar days (ending today or yesterday) with at least one entry logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All-time longest consecutive day streak with at least one entry

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeSubjects
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique subject names from entries in the last 30 days, sorted by total time descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeSubjectCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of unique subjects studied in last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDailyMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily study minutes over the last 30 days (total minutes / 30)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageConfidence
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean confidence level across all entries in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Each LearningCategory with total minutes and percentage of overall time for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 7 elements for current week, each with day label and total minutes for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: confidenceTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Per-subject confidence ratings over time for line chart, limited to top 5 subjects

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topSubjectByTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Subject with the most total study minutes in last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostImprovedSubject
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Subject with the largest positive confidence delta (latest vs earliest rating in last 30 days)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 3-5 dynamically generated insight strings: streak status, consistency patterns, subject suggestions, confidence plateau warnings, goal adherence trends

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recentSubjects
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 5 unique subjects for quick-pick in entry sheet, ordered by most recently used

dailyGoal.description: Target minutes of study per day. Drives progress ring on dashboard and goal line on weekly chart.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the user has logged at least one entry with durationMinutes >= 5 on that calendar day. Streak breaks if a full calendar day passes with zero qualifying entries. Today always extends the streak if it qualifies; if today has no entry yet, streak is calculated through yesterday.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: compare current week total minutes vs previous week total minutes to show week-over-week growth percentage. Secondary trend: 4-week rolling average of daily study minutes to detect acceleration or deceleration. Per-subject: track confidence level trajectory — flag subjects where confidence has plateaued (< 0.5 point change over 2+ weeks) or declined.
insights: Streak celebration — congratulate milestones at 7, 14, 30, 60, 100 days
Consistency check — if user studies 5+ days/week, praise consistency; if < 3 days, suggest scheduling regular sessions
Subject balance — if one subject dominates > 60% of time, suggest diversifying or confirm intentional deep-dive
Confidence plateau — if a subject's confidence hasn't changed in 2+ weeks despite study time, suggest changing resource type or approach
Goal adherence — percentage of days in last 2 weeks where daily goal was met, with trend direction
Peak performance time — if entries cluster around certain times of day, note the user's most productive learning window
Resource effectiveness — compare confidence gain rate across resource types to suggest which formats work best for the user
